---
title: "Data & Tools"
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-single">
  <div class="content">

    <section class="section reveal">
      <div class="wip-banner">
        <div class="wip-banner-label">Work in Progress</div>
        <h2 class="wip-banner-title">Data &amp; Tools</h2>
        <p class="wip-banner-text">This page will host replication archives, original datasets, and small tools from my research. Check back soon.</p>
      </div>
    </section>

  </div>
</div>

<footer>
  <p class="footer-text">&copy; 2026 Giuseppe Peressotti</p>
</footer>
```
